## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added or updated
- [ ] `uv run pytest` passes
- [ ] `uv run ruff check src/ tests/ scripts/` passes
- [ ] `uv run python scripts/validate_examples.py` passes
- [ ] New checks include severity and confidence levels
- [ ] Auto-fixes are conservative and non-destructive (no file deletion, no source-code changes)
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated under `[Unreleased]` if user-facing behaviour changed
- [ ] README updated if new commands, flags, or checks are added
